calendar.matters:
Motion For Judgment For Respondent And Real Party In Interest City And County Of San Francisco
Off Calendar Aug-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ppearances (by Zoom):
Veronica Tunucci 415-259-8944 Petitioner in Pro Per (in-person)
Peter Cownan, Esq. Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3863 for Respondent.

ARGUED. Ms. Tunucci contests the tentative ruling to relitigate was not a fair assessment. Mr Cownan responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Judgment. The City and County of San Francisco's motion for judgment is granted. Pro per petitioner's "opposition" is a belated effort to relitigate her motion for administrative writ, which was denied.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (in-person):
Veronica Tunucci, 415-259-8944 Petitioner in Pro Per
Peter Abraham Cownan, Esq. Deputy city attorney, 415-554-3863 for Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D. Ms. Tunucci argues. Mr. Cownan responds. The Court shares its views. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER VERONICA TUNUCCI's Petittion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus and Damages.

Taken Under submission. Respondent to submit a proposed order today.

Respondent to submit a proposed order by email today that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
